text.text:
*New Slide Types signals — week of May 4*

Trajectory
  • Pin on Image: 212 users (WoW +15%), 320 times. 4wk: fading.
  • Idea Board: 322 users (WoW +65%), 663 times. 4wk: growing.
  • Ranking: 345 users (WoW +12%), 568 times. 4wk: fading.

Repeat-use (slides per user, this week)
  • Pin on Image: 1.5
  • Idea Board: 2.1
  • Ranking: 1.7
Range across engagement slides this week: 1.5–2.7.

Adoption rank (by unique users)
  Among non-quiz slides: Pin on Image #15, Idea Board #13, Ranking #11.
  Among all slide types: Pin on Image #19, Idea Board #17, Ranking #15.

*Notable*
  • Idea Board up 65% WoW and unambiguously growing — climbing both rankings (non-quiz #14→#13, all #18→#17), and repeat-use now matches Word Cloud at 2.1.
  • Ranking bounced +12% WoW but the four-week direction is still fading; one good week is not yet a comeback.
  • Pin on Image sits at the floor of the engagement-slide range at 1.5 slides per user — tied with Q&A. Tried, not yet committed to.

<https://eu.mixpanel.com/project/2668743/view/3205947/app/boards#id=11071959|Dashboard>

blocks.alt_text: Weekly unique users — new slide types vs engagement-slide range
